name: 4D Molecular Therapeutics, Inc.
business: 4D Molecular Therapeutics is a late-stage biotechnology company developing genetic medicines using evolved adeno-associated virus (AAV) vectors for retinal and lung diseases. Its lead product candidate, 4D-150, targets wet age-related macular degeneration and diabetic macular edema via intravitreal injection, and 4D-710 targets cystic fibrosis lung disease via aerosol delivery.
sellsTo: patients with wet age-related macular degeneration
patients with cystic fibrosis lung disease

exposures.sentence: We are a leading late-stage biotechnology company advancing durable and disease-targeted therapeutics with the potential to transform treatment paradigms and provide unprecedented benefits to patients.

catalysts.event: Topline data from 4FRONT-1 Phase 3 trial for wet AMD (52-week primary endpoint)
catalysts.sentence: We continue to anticipate topline data with the 52-week primary endpoint in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Topline data from 4FRONT-2 Phase 3 trial for wet AMD (52-week primary endpoint)
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate topline data with the 52-week primary endpoint in the second half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Initiation of a single global Phase 3 clinical trial for 4D-150 in DME
catalysts.sentence: a single global Phase 3 clinical trial is expected to initiate in the third quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global branded therapeutic market for retinal vascular diseases exceeds $16 billion, with wet AMD and DME comprising approximately $14 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Bolus anti-VEGF treatment of retinal vascular diseases represents global branded therapeutic markets of over $16 billion, with wet AMD and DME comprising approximately $14 billion.
